mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HOSPITAL_UPDATE_REQUEST (HOSPITAL_ID, MEMBER_ID, MEDICAL_SUBJECTS, OPEN_TIME, CLOSE_TIME, LUNCH_TIME, HOLIDAY) VALUES (#{hospitalId}, #{memberId}, #{medicalSubjects}, #{openTime}, #{closeTime}, #{lunchTime}, #{holiday})
mapper.select: SELECT R.*, H.NAME as hospitalName FROM HOSPITAL_UPDATE_REQUEST R JOIN HOSPITAL H ON R.HOSPITAL_ID = H.HOSPITAL_ID WHERE R.STATUS = 'PENDING' ORDER BY R.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT HOSPITAL_ID AS hospitalId, OWNER_ID AS ownerId, NAME AS name, OPEN_TIME AS openTime, CLOSE_TIME AS closeTime, BREAK_TIME AS lunchTime, CLOSED_DAYS AS holiday, STATUS AS status, NOTE AS note, MEDICAL_SUBJECTS AS medicalSubjects FROM HOSPITAL WHERE OWNER_ID = #{ownerId} ORDER BY HOSPITAL_ID DESC

SELECT HOSPITAL_ID AS hospitalId, OWNER_ID AS ownerId, NAME AS name, OPEN_TIME AS openTime, CLOSE_TIME AS closeTime, BREAK_TIME AS lunchTime, CLOSED_DAYS AS holiday, STATUS AS status, NOTE AS note, MEDICAL_SUBJECTS AS medicalSubjects FROM HOSPITAL WHERE HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId}
SELECT SUBJECT_ID FROM HOSPITAL_MEDICAL_SUBJECT WHERE HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId}
SELECT * FROM HOSPITAL_UPDATE_REQUEST WHERE HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE HOSPITAL SET STATUS = 'CLOSED', NOTE = 'DELETE_PENDING', UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE OWNER_ID IN (SELECT MEMBER_ID FROM APP_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_STATUS = 'DELETED') AND (NOTE IS NULL OR NOTE != 'DELETE_PENDING')
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM HOSPITAL WHERE STATUS = 'CLOSED' AND NOTE = 'DELETE_PENDING' AND UPDATED_AT <= SYSTIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '1' HOUR
